name: Barbell Deadlift
description: The deadlift is the ultimate measure of absolute strength. By mastering the hinge and maintaining a solid core, you unlock unparalleled posterior chain power.
proTip: Imagine trying to crush an orange in your armpits before you pull – this locks your lats and protects your spine.

name: Air Squat
description: The foundational human movement. Perfecting the air squat ensures mobility and strength for more complex olympic lifting.
proTip: Keep the weight in your heels and mid-foot. If your toes lift slightly, you're on the right track.

name: Strict Pull-up
description: True upper body pulling prowess. A strict pull-up requires controlled descent and peak engagement.
proTip: Drive your elbows down into your back pockets rather than just pulling with your hands.

name: Kettlebell Swing
description: Explosive hip extension and core stability. The swing is the gateway to kettlebell mastery.
proTip: The swing is a hinge, not a squat. Think of your arms as ropes and your hips as the engine.

name: Standard Push-up
description: The universal test of horizontal pressing strength and core rigidity.
proTip: Screw your hands into the floor as if you're trying to tear a piece of paper to create stable shoulders.

name: Turkish Get-up
description: A full-body mobility and stability masterpiece. The TGU explores every plane of movement.
proTip: Keep your eyes locked on the weight at all times until you're fully standing.
